creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
I can reproduce it on 3.2.3. I've created new family tree. Create one 
person. Then export it into GEDCOM format. Then i've deleted family 
tree, create new family tree and when trying to import got the crash you 
described. So it seems like a mainstream bug to me. I'll try to mess 
with it some time and then file the bug report in gramps tracker.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
